subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-04-27
subcodes.first_line: Beneath the shade of the Blessed Perfection there must occur in a Baha'i life a complete regeneration! If he continues to live in accord with the old standards and habits, then what has he gained by the change of a name!
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
